name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_faqs

facts.note: "Grow Your Mind" email capture is visible near the footer.
No signup reward is shown with the email field.
No reviews or testimonials are visible on the FAQ page.
The FAQ content does not include a product CTA in the sampled body.
The page leads with "Pain-Free Ordering" and addresses return/shipping trust questions.

observed_strengths.observation: The FAQ page leads with commerce-relevant ordering, returns, and shipping questions rather than generic brand trivia.

missing_or_weak.observation: The page is useful for objections but does not route readers back into product discovery with a body CTA.

purchase_path_notes: This is a strong objection-handling support page, but it remains a content dead end in the sampled body.
